title: Fidacy Risk Payload
description: The signed claims set (the verdict) carried by a Fidacy compact JWS. These are the JSON claims that are signed with EdDSA (Ed25519) and independently verifiable against the public JWKS at https://api.fidacy.com/.well-known/jwks.json. Unknown fields are permitted for forward compatibility; verifiers MUST ignore fields they do not recognize.

issuer.description: The signer's DID. A did:web identity fragment for Fidacy; the fragment is the signing key id (kid).

subject.description: Opaque identifier of the agent or mandate that was assessed.

signals.description: Free-form, advisory signals. OPAQUE: the set of keys and their meaning are not part of this specification, may change without notice, and MUST NOT be relied on for decisioning. The signed `decision` is the authoritative output.

model_version.description: Identifier of the scoring model that produced this verdict. Independent of the format version (see VERSIONING.md).

assessed_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 date-time at which the assessment was made.
